candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Could be similar in some periods, but the cleaner standard cash line exists.
Restricted cash should not be the main CHE measure when unrestricted cash and cash equivalents is reported separately.

variables.notes: Preferred the standard balance-sheet cash line over alternatives and excluded restricted cash.

candidates.why: Exact total for current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component only, not total current liabilities.
Debt component only, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clean current debt line on the balance sheet that appears separate from current leasing liabilities, matching short-term debt excluding leases.
Current portion of long-term debt, but values are sparse and may be only one component rather than the full current debt total.
Would be a component of short-term debt if populated, but appears blank.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the STD shortlist because it is a cleaner reported current debt total and appears to exclude leases, which are separately reported as 'Current leasing liabilities'. Avoided 'Total interest-bearing current liabilities' because it likely includes leases.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best available balance-sheet line representing tangible fixed assets / PPE net; cleaner than balancing rows and more appropriate than lease-only PPE lines.
PPE component only, not total PPE.
Balancing line, not a reported PPE total.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because 'Fixed assets' is the best reported balance-sheet proxy for total/net PPE in these statements. Excluded right-of-use assets and lease-specific PPE lines for the baseline PPE measure.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Standard total operating cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities - continuing operations
candidates.why: Useful alternative in some periods, but total operating cash flow line exists and is preferable.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities - discontinued operations
candidates.why: Discontinued operations only, not total operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Preferred the total operating cash flow line over continuing-operations-only line.
